findings.summary: A scoped subset of generated allergen claims is inferred from culinary names without explicit support in the restaurant-authored Toast text, including claims on cakes and wonton dishes. Direct ingredient words remain valid positive disclosure evidence and must not be blanket-downgraded.

The current restaurant-linked menu contains selected positive ingredient disclosures but no comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredients, allergen legend, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy.

repairs.summary: Identify the exact unsupported culinary-term inferences and remove only those claims while preserving allergens directly disclosed by restaurant-authored item names and descriptions.
